name: Wonderous World
description:
Arcadia, land of adventure, fortune, and no end of hot, sweaty smut.

In this world, you will play the part of an adventurer, learning of the world as you go (And totally not because I couldn't think of a good way to write a primer without rehashing the personality section word for word). It's a fairly standard High Medieval setting, with Humans, Elves, Catfolk, etc. There are a number of regions to explore, each with it's own flavor and hidden gems.

UPDATES:

New completely blank intro!

- CURRENT REGIONS -

Fertilia (NobleBright Kingdom - Starting zone)

Sunset Isles (Elven Elegance - Across the sea to the west)

Northcrown (Ice and Sagas - You really need me to tell you which direction to go?)

Wide Marches (Untamed Wilderness and Gothic Horror - To the east of Fertilia, south of Nortcrown)

Angcragon (Not!Asia - East of the Wide Marches, north of Dethan)

Dethan (Arabian Nights - South of Angcragon and the eastern Wide Marches)

The Shattered Lands (Pirates and Amazons - South of Dethan)

Sky Cities (Magic and Might - They float here and there)

The Deeps (Underground & Demons - Various tunnel entrances)

Atlaria (Underwater Hegemony - Glub,glub)

Note that this is designed to be a relaxed, easy scenario. Romance should be easy, and any woman you come across is bound to be attractive. This bot is also designed to act as a co-author with the player, providing results for what your character does. It's up to you to move the story forward.

This is my second attempt at creating a true scenario-style bot, so there may be some teething issues. If you encounter any or have any suggestions, feel free to let me know! I'm willing to share the code I used with other creators if they ask and agree to talk shop on Discord, but I'm not willing to take the risk of making it public for any and all. Currently there are no example dialogues as I am unsure whether as to whether or not that would color the sorts of characters the bot presents to you. Also let me know if it repeats it's self or you at an abnormal rate, since I have some suspicions that the manner in which I wrote the intro may lead to that.

Current picture is just a placeholder for now. I plan to spend some time generating something truly special!

Also, BIG inspiration from https://isekaicyoa.neocities.org/ as I'm sure you can tell with even a cursory glance! Got ahead and check it out if you like this! (Mods, PLEASE tell me if that link violates TOS or something instead of out and out nuking the bot 🙏).

With all th
creator: Cha;amagne
